name: Delete all Valhalla-imported rules from the Sekoia Rules Catalog
description: One-shot cleanup: deletes every rule that `sync-sigma-rules-catalog` created in this tenant (identified via the module's local id-map). Never touches user-created rules or Sekoia's verified catalog. Defaults to dry-run — set `confirm=true` in the trigger configuration for deletions to actually run. After the first pass the id-map is empty; subsequent runs are no-ops.

confirm.title: Confirm deletion
confirm.description: Must be true for rules to actually be deleted. When false, the trigger emits a report of what WOULD be deleted and makes no API calls.

frequency.title: Re-run frequency in seconds
frequency.description: How often to re-check the id-map for anything left to delete. After a successful first pass this is a no-op. Default 24h.
